note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

requestor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

address_or_po_box.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

city_state_zip.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

amount.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

card_number.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

billing_address.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

city.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

state.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.
